## Checklist
- [ ] Lint passes (`npm run lint`)
- [ ] Tests pass (`npm test -- --watch=false --browsers=ChromeHeadless`)

- [ ] Lighthouse a11y ≥ 95 on the built artifact
- [ ] No `any` introduced; no literal hex/rgb in SCSS
